name: guildhall
summary: A guild's meeting hall — long table for elder councils, a heraldic banner on the wall, trophies of the craft displayed in cases, a lectern for public address. A hall where decisions get made.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: long rectangle, long-table oriented along the long axis

accent.purpose: formal runner down the central axis

primary_palette.note: classic council hall — long-table occupies the center, banner behind
assembly hall — speaker at lectern, members on benches
trophy hall — council table with craft relics on display

story_prompts: annual vote — elders seated, members standing, tally being read
crisis session — emergency meeting, guild master furious, rival faction arguing
induction ceremony — initiates kneeling before the long-table, banner raised
empty hall after session — overturned chairs, spilled goblet, one elder lingering

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: formal hall-light (0.5) — chandelier over the long-table

anti_patterns: the long-table is the focus — don't clutter the center with other props
banner behind the head of the table — visual axis
leave clear walking room on both sides of the table for attendants
